What We Do

EXPERTISE
ACROSS
DOMAINS

From board-level security governance to on-the-ground assurance in the world's most complex environments — Paladin delivers senior-led capability built around your precise requirements.

01
Strategic Intelligence

Tailored threat assessments, geopolitical analysis, and actionable intelligence briefings for senior decision-makers operating in complex and contested environments.

02
Cyber, Information & Risk Management

End-to-end cyber threat intelligence, information security advisory, and enterprise risk management — safeguarding critical assets and decision-making integrity against sophisticated digital threats.

03
Director-Level Security Consulting

Board and director-level security advisory for organisations requiring embedded, senior expertise. Strategic risk frameworks, governance oversight, and hands-on management support — acting as a trusted extension of your leadership team.

04
Face-to-Face Assurance & Hostile Environment Operations

Senior personal deployment into complex, hostile, or politically sensitive locations to deliver direct assurance, host negotiations, and on-the-ground results where remote counsel is insufficient.

05
Secure International Travel Management

End-to-end secure travel management for individuals and organisations operating across international borders — including route planning, advance work, in-transit security, and coordination with trusted ground assets worldwide.

06
Due Diligence & Investigations

Discreet background investigations, partner vetting, and financial intelligence to protect business interests before critical commitments are made.

"When the situation demands physical presence, direct dialogue, and results on the ground — Paladin delivers."

Hostile Environment Operations · Host Nation Negotiations · Face-to-Face Assurance

Where We Operate

TRULY GLOBAL CAPABILITY

Paladin maintains a network of trusted partners, analysts, and operators across every major region — enabling seamless service delivery wherever clients require.

🌍
EUROPE & UK

Deep operational roots across the UK, Continental Europe, and the former Soviet sphere — with long-standing institutional relationships at the highest levels.

🌏
MIDDLE EAST & ASIA

Established networks across the Gulf, Levant, South Asia, and Southeast Asia — navigating complex political and cultural terrain with authority.

🌐
AFRICA

Specialist knowledge across Sub-Saharan Africa and the Maghreb, supporting extractive industry clients, NGOs, and governmental partners.

⚠️
HIGH-RISK ENVIRONMENTS

Dedicated capability for conflict-affected and post-conflict zones — hostile environment operations, personnel security, and negotiated access.

🔐
CYBER & DIGITAL

Intelligence-led cyber threat advisory, digital footprint management, and OSINT capability supporting the full range of Paladin's services globally.

🤝
HOST NATION & NEGOTIATIONS

Face-to-face engagement with host nation authorities, local stakeholders, and partner organisations — providing direct assurance and negotiated outcomes in environments where physical presence is the only credible option.

How We Work

PRINCIPLED.
PRECISE.
PRESENT.

Every Paladin engagement begins with a private, senior-level consultation to understand your specific environment, objectives, and risk profile. Where others send reports, we provide presence.

Our clients are leaders and organisations for whom failure is not an option — and who require a consultant prepared to operate wherever the situation demands, including on the ground in hostile environments.

◈

Intelligence-Led

Every recommendation is grounded in verified intelligence, not assumption.

◈

Physically Present

Face-to-face assurance and on-the-ground delivery in any environment, globally.

◈

Absolute Discretion

Client confidentiality is non-negotiable — before, during, and after every engagement.

◈

Senior-Level Only

You deal directly with an experienced principal. Never delegated to junior staff.

Operational Track Record

PROVEN IN THE FIELD

Paladin's capability is not theoretical. It has been tested and proven across some of the world's most demanding operational environments — delivering results where the stakes are absolute.

🇺🇦
UKRAINE Kinetic & Cyber Threat Environment · Kyiv

Provided protective security and governance counsel to senior MOD and Embassy leadership, supporting the safety and continuity of over 300 personnel during a period of active escalation.

Designed theatre-wide risk frameworks that materially improved executive decision confidence under simultaneous kinetic and cyber threat conditions.

Maintained operational continuity during elevated hostile activity through dynamic risk mitigation — ensuring no loss of mission capability.

Ensured secure integration of digital platforms in a contested environment, protecting classified information flows under active threat.

🇲🇱
MALI UN Context · Volatile & High-Risk · Gao

Directed enterprise-level security governance in one of West Africa's most volatile operating environments, sustaining protection for over 300 personnel.

Oversaw a £7 million infrastructure security assurance programme, ensuring full MOD and international compliance under live threat conditions.

Authored investigations and assurance reports that strengthened oversight mechanisms and governance accountability at theatre level.

Developed Business Continuity Plans that preserved operational resilience through periods of rapid threat escalation.

🇦🇫
AFGHANISTAN CT / COIN Operations · High-Tempo Environment

Led 14 specialist personnel within a 700-person organisation delivering high-sensitivity counter-terrorism and counter-insurgency outputs under sustained operational pressure.

Re-engineered governance frameworks and SOPs to significantly improve compliance and operational efficiency in a high-tempo, classified environment.

Integrated classified IT systems and specialist technical capabilities while maintaining secure delivery under active operational pressure.

Chaired senior governance forums, driving delivery, assurance and stakeholder alignment at the highest operational levels.
